inputs.label: Deck Length
inputs.businessContext: Total length of the deck area in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total length of the deck area in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güverte alanının metre cinsinden toplam uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur totale de la surface du pont en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud total del área de la plataforma en metros.

inputs.label: Deck Width
inputs.businessContext: Total width of the deck area in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total width of the deck area in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Güverte alanının metre cinsinden toplam genişliği.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur totale de la surface du pont en mètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho total del área de la plataforma en metros.

inputs.label: Board Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of one deck board, typically available in standard sizes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of one deck board, typically available in standard sizes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir güverte tahtasının uzunluğu, genellikle standart boyutlarda mevcuttur.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge eines Terrassendielenbretts, typischerweise in Standardgrößen erhältlich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur d'une lame de terrasse, généralement disponible en tailles standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud de una tabla de cubierta, normalmente disponible en tamaños estándar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: طول لوح السطح الواحد، متوفر عادة بأحجام قياسية.

inputs.label: Board Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of one deck board (e.g., 140 mm = 0.14 m).

businessContext_i18n.en: Width of one deck board (e.g., 140 mm = 0.14 m).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir güverte tahtasının genişliği (ör. 140 mm = 0,14 m).
businessContext_i18n.de: Breite eines Terrassendielenbretts (z. B. 140 mm = 0,14 m).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Largeur d'une lame de terrasse (ex. : 140 mm = 0,14 m).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ancho de una tabla de cubierta (ej. 140 mm = 0.14 m).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عرض لوح السطح الواحد (مثل 140 مم = 0.14 م).

inputs.label: Board Price
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of one deck board in currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit price of one deck board in currency.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir güverte tahtasının para birimi cinsinden birim fiyatı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix unitaire d'une lame de terrasse en devise.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio unitario de una tabla de cubierta en la moneda correspondiente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر الوحدة للوح السطح الواحد بالعملة.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional material percentage to account for cuts and waste (e.g., 10% = 0.1).

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional material percentage to account for cuts and waste (e.g., 10% = 0.1).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim ve fireyi hesaba katmak için ek malzeme yüzdesi (ör. %10 = 0,1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzlicher Materialprozentsatz für Zuschnitte und Verschnitt (z. B. 10 % = 0,1).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de matériau supplémentaire pour tenir compte des coupes et des pertes (ex. : 10 % = 0,1).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional de material para cortes y desperdicios (ej. 10% = 0.1).
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة المواد الإضافية لمراعاة القص والهدر (مثل 10% = 0.1).
